title: Pride Plus
description: A vanilla++ modpack meant to accentuate vanilla minecraft while smoothing out the rough edges of unmodded content.
body:
A feature-light, vanilla-plus modpack.

While there are a relatively large number of mods, they mostly serve one of three purposes: 
### 1. Enhancing/refining vanilla gameplay
We've added mods that expand on all the vanilla structures from villages and Trial Chambers, made horses a more attractive transportation option, and enabled pet dogs to live longer than a single night.

### 2. Expanding visual style through retextures and mods
Fresh Textures is the base canvas where mods like Better Clouds, Effective, and others paint.

### 3. Providing fun diversions for a server
From Chipped providing more blocks to build with to Simple Voice Chat and Analog building communication into the gameplay.


From my tests, clientside won't need more than **5.4 GiBs** to run this, but the safe number is always **8 GiBs** for modded Minecraft. Servers will need even less.
